response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with cloud compute focus. Resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (2007-2008) and primary expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or production-scale distributed systems work in C++.
strengths: Long tenure with leadership/mentoring exposure including workshops, talks, and Selenium course creation
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Sociomantic handling millions of requests/sec
Broad polyglot background spanning embedded, backend, and infrastructure tooling
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of C/C++ work listed (National Instruments, 2007-2008)
No evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed systems architecture at the required scale
Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not aligned with a C++-centric cloud compute platform role

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale distributed systems experience
Mentoring and technical leadership track record
